creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I think the recommended procedure for a revive is revert removed port, apply changes and commit.
---
git log -- audio/solfege
git revert <tag>

aplly changes
commit.
---
I'm I correct?
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2022-July/002199.html

Thanks
